top_signals.title: ‘Very strong’ nuclear verification needed in Iran after war: IAEA head
top_signals.summary: The United States and Iran are negotiating a broader agreement to end the war, with Tehran's nuclear program remaining one of the key sticking points.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Apple's Price Hikes Shake Tech Sentiment | Insight with Haslinda Amin 06/26/2026
top_signals.summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wesdome Gold Mines grows reserve base to support production through 2033
top_signals.summary: The Canadian gold miner said the combined reserve count across its two operations has risen by 17% to a record 1.4 million oz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
